# UXON AI

> Landing pages, A/B experiments, and conversion tracking your AI agent can build and run.

UXON AI is a CRO platform with an agent-first API, MCP server, and Claude skills
playbook. Agents use UXON to create landing pages, import externally coded pages,
launch cross-domain A/B experiments, track first-party conversions, and pull CRO
reports, all without logging into the dashboard.

## Key URLs

- Website: https://uxon.ai
- Live agent skills: https://uxon.ai/api/skills
- MCP server endpoint: https://uxon.ai/api/mcp
- API command endpoint: https://uxon.ai/api/external/commands
- GitHub: https://github.com/alexpilotto/uxon-ai

## Important Docs

- Agent command playbook: ./SKILLS.md
- Quickstart: ./QUICKSTART.md
- Landing pages: ./skills/landing-pages.md
- Experiments: ./skills/experiments.md
- Conversion tracking: ./skills/conversion-tracking.md
- Reports: ./skills/reports.md
- Runbooks: ./runbooks/README.md

## Command Envelope

{
  "command": "landing_pages.generate_from_brief",
  "input": {}
}

POST https://uxon.ai/api/external/commands
Authorization: Bearer uxon_live_...
Content-Type: application/json

## What Agents Can Do

- Create blank landing pages or submit AI briefs and poll generation jobs.
- Import coded page bundles from Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, or v0.
- Publish, duplicate, and review landing pages through API commands.
- Launch A/B experiments across UXON pages, external URLs, or URL patterns.
- Track conversions with first-party attribution across variants, channels,
  contacts, and revenue events.
- Configure GTM or direct GA4/Meta tracking with guardrails.
- Pull CRO reports and channel breakdowns for agent analysis.
- Onboard agency client accounts with branding, domains, and goals.
